text:
Created attachment 159402
Version b

Add Pocket Mine port - http://www.pocketmine.net

I tried the 1.4.1 phar release but it's broken (on FreeBSD anyway) - it runs but the client doesn't see the server.

Diff is on github if it helps (https://github.com/DanielO/freebsd-ports)
